findings.description: The hint "XSS" appears in s6 hints but the source file does not mention XSS anywhere. The source only states that HTML escaping should be performed, and that the rawWrite/prettyPrint tags should only be used when HTML escaping must be avoided.
findings.source_evidence: 本機能は、HTMLのソースコードを表示したい場合など、HTMLエスケープをどうしても避けたい場合に使用する。それ以外の場合は、HTMLエスケープを行うこと。 — no mention of XSS

findings.description: PascalCase class names `ValidationUtil` and `ValidationContext` appear in the update-screen code example in s1 but are absent from the hints array. Additionally, `n:select` attributes `elementLabelPattern` and `listFormat` appear in the multiple-selection JSP example but are not included in hints.
